posts.text: Man Industries - Company Overview and Q4 FY 26 highlights - Company’s manufacturing capacities - Anjar ( Gujarat ) - focussed on exports markets - 2 LSAW Lines 2 HSAW Lines 1 ERW pies unit Anti Corrosion coating systems ( PE, FBE, CTE, PU coatings ) Total capacity @ 8 lakh MTPA Pitahmpur (MP) - focussed on domestic markets - HSAW Line LSAW Line ERW Line PU coatings facility Total capacity @ 4 lakh MTPA National Pipes Company ( Dhahran, KSA ) - acquired in Q4 FY 26 ( for aprox 1000 cr ) - HSAW and LSAW manufacturing lines Combined facility of 4.3 lakh MTPA Greenfield Capex @ Jammu - To manufact…
